allow: Bash(python3 -c " import subprocess, os # Get all strings from all iwa files all_text = [] iwa_dir = ''/tmp/pages-extract/Index'' for root, dirs, files in os.walk\(iwa_dir\): for f in files: if f.endswith\(''.iwa''\): path = os.path.join\(root, f\) result = subprocess.run\([''strings'', path], capture_output=True, text=True\) lines = result.stdout.split\(''\\n''\) for line in lines: line = line.strip\(\) if len\(line\) > 5 and any\(c.isalpha\(\) for c in line\): # Filter obvious locale/format strings if not any\(x in line for x in [''enero'', ''febrero'', ''marzo'', ''abril'', ''mayo'', ''junio'', ''julio'', ''agosto'', ''septiembre'', ''octubre'', ''noviembre'', ''diciembre'', ''lunes'', ''martes'', ''miercoles'', ''jueves'', ''viernes'', ''sabado'', ''domingo'']\): all_text.append\(line\) # Deduplicate while preserving order seen = set\(\) unique = [] for line in all_text: if line not in seen: seen.add\(line\) unique.append\(line\) print\(''\\n''.join\(unique\)\) ")
